nodes.label: AI for exploratory tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I occasionally use it to generate simple code for exploratory work, but would not trust it for publication quality analysis

nodes.label: AI for protein structure modeling (AlphaFold)
nodes.grounding_span: We have used AlphaFold pretty extensively to model potential protein structures

nodes.label: AI applicability to complex biological systems
nodes.label_negative: AI inapplicability to complex biological systems
nodes.grounding_span: I don't see how AI would be beneficial in either of those areas. Both the models and the training data just don't exist

nodes.label: AI integration into existing software
nodes.grounding_span: If AI could integrate and normalize all this data in a single repository, it could be a very exciting thing for biological discovery

nodes.label: AI assistance in grant writing
nodes.label_negative: Fair, merit-based publication and grant processes
nodes.grounding_span: The effects of AI on the publication process are quite worrying, and the system is further shifting in favor of those who know how to game the system

nodes.label: Research efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: Traditional protein structure methods are very resource intensive and technically challenging

nodes.label: Scientific rigor and accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: Targeted biological research with model systems is still very much important for high quality science

nodes.label: Biological discovery and hypothesis generation
nodes.grounding_span: It could be a very exciting thing for biological discovery

nodes.label: Fairness and objectivity in evaluation
nodes.grounding_span: It is important that the strong scientific practices can still prevail and that safeguards be in place

nodes.label: Cautious trust in AI
nodes.grounding_span: I occasionally use it to generate simple code for exploratory work, but would not trust it for publication quality analysis

nodes.label: Positive embrace of AlphaFold for structural modeling
nodes.grounding_span: We have used AlphaFold pretty extensively to model potential protein structures

nodes.label: Skepticism toward AI in complex biological modeling
nodes.grounding_span: I don't see how AI would be beneficial in either of those areas

nodes.label: Optimistic aspiration for AI-driven data integration
nodes.grounding_span: If AI could integrate and normalize all this data in a single repository, it could be a very exciting thing for biological discovery

nodes.label: Concern about AI undermining learning
nodes.grounding_span: The effects of AI on the publication process are quite worrying

nodes.label: Structured iterative validation — uses AI to systematically check and refine work
nodes.grounding_span: I will typically do a more manual manipulation alongside the coding and validate at each step before iterating the process

nodes.label: Intentional limitation and selective use of AI
nodes.grounding_span: You would have to model an entire cell with millions of molecular interactions every second in order to predict what would happen in silicon with any amount of accuracy
